title: fagus sylvatica f. rotundifolia
intro: Fagus sylvatica f. rotundifolia, also known as the rounded-leaved or dwarf beech, is a variety of the European beech tree (Fagus sylvatica) characterized by its compact growth habit and rounded leaves. The medicinal properties of Fagus sylvatica f. rotundifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using Fagus sylvatica f. rotundifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Fagus sylvatica f. rotundifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
